name: KMD Client Package Examples
description: Create runnable examples demonstrating the @algorandfoundation/algokit-kmd-client package. IMPORTANT: After implementing each example, you MUST run it to verify it works: `npx tsx <example>.ts`. The kmd-client package provides a typed, promise-based client for the Algorand Key Management Daemon (KMD) REST API, enabling wallet management, key operations, and transaction signing.

userStories.title: Infrastructure Setup - Shared Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared utilities and constants for all kmd_client examples so that examples have consistent setup and helper functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/shared/constants.ts with KMD_CONFIG (port 4002) and ALGOD_CONFIG (port 4001) for LocalNet connection

Create examples/kmd_client/shared/utils.ts with: printHeader(), printStep(), printInfo(), printSuccess(), printError(), formatAlgo(), shortenAddress(), createKmdClient(), createAlgodClient(), createAlgorandClient(), getFundedAccount(), createTestWallet(), cleanupTestWallet()
Create examples/kmd_client/package.json referencing file:../../dist for @algorandfoundation/algokit-utils
Create examples/kmd_client/tsconfig.json with ESM module settings
Create examples/kmd_client/README.md documenting all kmd_client examples
npm install runs without errors in examples/kmd_client directory
TypeScript compiles without errors: npx tsc --noEmit

userStories.title: Version Check Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to check KMD server version using version().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/01-version.ts
Demonstrate version() to get KMD server version information
Display version fields: versions array containing supported API versions
Handle and display any connection errors gracefully
Run the example with `npx tsx 01-version.ts` and verify it completes successfully

userStories.title: Wallet Creation and Listing Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to create, list, and rename wallets using createWallet(), listWallets(), walletInfo(), and renameWallet().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/02-wallet-management.ts
Demonstrate createWallet() to create a new wallet with name and password
Display wallet fields from response: id, name, driverName, supportedTxs, mnemonicIdK
Demonstrate listWallets() to list all available wallets
Display each wallet's id and name from the wallets array
Demonstrate walletInfo() to get detailed wallet information (requires wallet handle)
Demonstrate renameWallet() to rename the wallet
Clean up by deleting the test wallet at the end
Run the example with `npx tsx 02-wallet-management.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Wallet Session Management Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to manage wallet sessions using initWalletHandle(), renewWalletHandleToken(), and releaseWalletHandleToken().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/03-wallet-sessions.ts
Create a test wallet for the example
Demonstrate initWalletHandle() to unlock a wallet and get a handle token
Display the wallet handle token from the response
Demonstrate walletInfo() to check token expiration time
Display tokenExpiresInSeconds from the response
Demonstrate renewWalletHandleToken() to extend token validity
Show the new expiration time after renewal
Demonstrate releaseWalletHandleToken() to invalidate the token
Show that the token is no longer valid after release
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 03-wallet-sessions.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Key Generation Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to generate new keys in a wallet using generateKey().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/04-key-generation.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Demonstrate generateKey() to generate a new key in the wallet
Display the generated public address from the response
Generate multiple keys to show they are deterministically derived
Display all generated addresses
Explain that generated keys can be recovered using the master derivation key
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 04-key-generation.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Key Import and Export Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to import and export keys using importKey() and exportKey().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/05-key-import-export.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Create a random account using AlgorandClient to get a private key
Demonstrate importKey() to import the private key into the wallet
Display the imported address from the response
Demonstrate exportKey() to export the private key back
Display the exported private key (first/last few bytes for security)
Verify the exported key matches the original
Note that imported keys are NOT backed up by the master derivation key
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 05-key-import-export.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Key Listing and Deletion Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to list and delete keys using listKeysInWallet() and deleteKey().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/06-key-listing-deletion.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate several keys in the wallet
Demonstrate listKeysInWallet() to list all keys
Display all addresses from the keys array in the response
Demonstrate deleteKey() to delete one of the keys
Verify deletion by listing keys again and showing the key is gone
Handle the case where deleting a non-existent key
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 06-key-listing-deletion.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Master Key Export Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to export the master derivation key for wallet backup using exportMasterKey().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/07-master-key-export.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate a few keys in the wallet
Demonstrate exportMasterKey() to export the master derivation key
Display the master key (first/last few bytes for security)
Explain what the master key is used for (backup/recovery of generated keys)
Note that imported keys cannot be recovered from the master key
Explain the security implications of exposing the master key
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 07-master-key-export.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Multisig Account Setup Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to create multisig accounts using importMultisig().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/08-multisig-setup.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate 3 keys in the wallet to use as multisig participants
Demonstrate importMultisig() to create a 2-of-3 multisig account
Pass the publicKeys array, threshold (2), and version (1) parameters
Display the generated multisig address from the response
Explain the threshold parameter (minimum signatures required)
Explain the multisig version parameter
Show the relationship between the public keys and the multisig address
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 08-multisig-setup.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Multisig Account Management Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to manage multisig accounts using listMultisig(), exportMultisig(), and deleteMultisig().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/09-multisig-management.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate keys and create a multisig account
Demonstrate listMultisig() to list all multisig accounts in the wallet
Display all multisig addresses from the addresses array
Demonstrate exportMultisig() to get the multisig preimage information
Display the exported info: publicKeys, threshold, version
Demonstrate deleteMultisig() to remove the multisig account
Verify deletion by listing multisig accounts again
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 09-multisig-management.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Transaction Signing Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to sign transactions using signTransaction().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/10-transaction-signing.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate a key and fund it using the dispenser
Create a payment transaction using AlgorandClient suggestedParams
Demonstrate signTransaction() to sign the transaction
Display that the transaction was signed successfully
Show the signed transaction bytes (abbreviated)
Submit the signed transaction to the network using algod
Wait for confirmation and display the confirmed round
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 10-transaction-signing.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Multisig Transaction Signing Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to sign multisig transactions using signMultisigTransaction().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/11-multisig-signing.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate 3 keys and create a 2-of-3 multisig account
Fund the multisig account using the dispenser
Create a payment transaction from the multisig account
Demonstrate signMultisigTransaction() with the first signer
Show the partial multisig signature from the response
Demonstrate signMultisigTransaction() with the second signer to complete the signature
Show the completed multisig signature
Submit the multisig-signed transaction to the network
Wait for confirmation and display the confirmed round
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 11-multisig-signing.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Program Signing Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to sign programs/contracts using signProgram().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/12-program-signing.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate a key in the wallet
Create a simple TEAL program (e.g., a logic signature that checks the sender)
Compile the TEAL program using algod tealCompile
Demonstrate signProgram() to sign the compiled program bytes
Display the program signature from the response
Explain what program signing is used for (delegated logic signatures)
Show how the signature can be used with a LogicSig
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 12-program-signing.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Multisig Program Signing Example
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to see how to sign programs with multisig using signMultisigProgram().
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/13-multisig-program-signing.ts
Create a test wallet and get a wallet handle
Generate 3 keys and create a 2-of-3 multisig account
Create a simple TEAL program
Compile the TEAL program using algod tealCompile
Demonstrate signMultisigProgram() with the first signer
Show the partial multisig signature
Demonstrate signMultisigProgram() with the second signer
Show the completed multisig signature
Explain how multisig program signatures work (delegated multisig logic sigs)
Clean up the test wallet
Run the example with `npx tsx 13-multisig-program-signing.ts` and verify it completes successfully
If LocalNet errors occur, run `algokit localnet reset` and retry

userStories.title: Verification Script
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a script to run all kmd_client examples and verify they work.
acceptanceCriteria: Create examples/kmd_client/verify-all.sh bash script
Script runs each example in order (01 through 13)
Script reports success/failure for each example
Script exits with non-zero code if any example fails
Add npm script 'verify-all' to package.json
All 13 examples pass when running ./verify-all.sh
